description_long: This is a conical, brown paper bucket with a wide open top and a narrower base, resembling a disposable plant pot or compostable waste bin. The exterior is primarily a natural, unbleached paper color, with a prominent green band wrapping around the middle section. On the green band, there is a white geometric logo and partial text, suggesting branding or labeling, possibly for a gardening or eco-friendly product. The surface appears matte and slightly textured, typical of thick, pressed paper or cardboard. There are no visible handles, lids, or reinforcements, and the interior is likely hollow and made of the same material as the exterior. This object is lightweight and intended for temporary or single-use applications in urban or garden environments.
description: A conical, brown paper bucket with a green branded band and a wide open top, resembling a disposable plant pot or compostable bin. The surface is matte and slightly textured, with no handles or lid.
description_view_0: The brown paper bucket is seen from the side, showing its conical shape and plain, unmarked surface.
description_view_1: This view reveals the start of a green band with partial white text on the bucket's side.
description_view_2: The front displays the full green band with a white geometric logo and partial text, highlighting the branding.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the bucket shows the continuation of the green band and more partial text, with the rest of the surface plain brown.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: green band with white geometric logo and partial text
